payload.label: sink
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped stainless steel sink basin with a shiny reflective metallic finish and visible rounded rim and light surface scratches; a narrow strip of brown countertop is visible at the bottom — appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).

message.content: {"label":"sink","short_description":"stainless steel sink basin edge","long_description":"Partial, edge-cropped stainless steel sink basin with a shiny reflective metallic finish and visible rounded rim and light surface scratches; a narrow strip of brown countertop is visible at the bottom — appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).","attributes":["stainless steel","reflective surface","rounded rim","light scratches","edge-cropped/partial","visible countertop edge (brown)"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.5}
